subject: physics
title: 22M.1.SL.TZ1.25
question_html:
Three statements about radioactive decay are:

I.   The rate of decay is exponential.
II.  It is unaffected by temperature and pressure.
III. The decay of individual nuclei cannot be predicted.

Which statements are correct?

A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III
examiners_html: Option B was the most frequent answer by candidates, suggesting that many candidates are unclear about the basic characteristics of radioactive decay.
